---
title: Marie Lassiter Muniz
last: Muniz
middle: Lassiter
first: Marie
people_group: gradstudent
education: Ph.D. | University of North Texas <br> B.S.
subtitle: Ph.D. Student, Entomology
blurb: I am interested in how environmental and anthropogenic stressors impact important
  pollinator behaviors.
description: she/her
image: ../_images/_template.jpg
toc: false
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
  sort: pub_number desc
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: Muniz, M.
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: ../_images/_template.jpg
  links:
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: mlm7670@psu.edu
  - text: ORCID
    href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3191-2275
  - icon: github
    text: GitHub
    href: immortalwhat
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mariemuniz/
---

<hr>

::: {#about}

{{< meta blurb >}}

## Education

{{< meta education >}}

<br>
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
